name: audio-haxor
description: Desktop app to scan and manage VST/VST3/AU audio plugins, samples, and DAW projects

scripts.test: node scripts/run-js-tests.mjs && cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --lib && cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --test behavioral_ultra
scripts.doc:sync: pnpm run doc && rm -rf docs/api && mkdir -p docs && cp -R src-tauri/target/doc docs/api
scripts.clean: command rm -rf src-tauri/target dist node_modules/.cache && echo 'Cleaned build caches'
scripts.db:stats: sqlite3 "$HOME/Library/Application Support/com.menketechnologies.audio-haxor/audio_haxor.db" "SELECT 'plugins', COUNT(*) FROM plugins UNION ALL SELECT 'samples', COUNT(*) FROM audio_samples UNION ALL SELECT 'daw', COUNT(*) FROM daw_projects UNION ALL SELECT 'presets', COUNT(*) FROM presets;" && ls -lh "$HOME/Library/Application Support/com.menketechnologies.audio-haxor/audio_haxor.db"
scripts.rebuild: pnpm run bust && pnpm run clean && pnpm run tauri:build
